game.title: DOBBLE
game.subtitle: Find the match!
howto.title: How to play?
howto.step1: Two cards with symbols are shown on screen
howto.step2: Find the one matching symbol on both cards
howto.step3: Tap the matching symbol as fast as you can!
howto.step4: The faster you find it — the more points you get
settings.title: Settings
confirm.exitMessage: Current round progress will be lost.
confirm.resetMessage: Best score will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
mode.title: SELECT MODE
mode.hint: Mode choice affects the whole match
